headline: American Express Expands Canadian Dining Reach To Deepen Everyday Card Use
summary: American Express (NYSE:AXP) has expanded card acceptance across a range of popular Canadian restaurant chains. The move increases the number of dining locations where American Express cards can be used, adding to everyday use cases for cardmembers. This step aligns with the company’s focus on dining as a key spending category within its global payments and lifestyle platform. For investors, this new push in Canada fits with American Express' core model as a payments network tied closely to...
